summary: App with profile/account creation flow and user dashboard showing task completed, user ratings, total ratings, and related stats.

existing_features.title: When the user clicks the profile icon in HubTopBar, if the user does not have an existing profile, guide them through the account creation flow (Internet Identity authentication + Google Sign-In for Gmail linking + profile details form) before granting access to the profile view. Only after a profile is successfully created or confirmed to exist should the dashboard be displayed.

Add a user dashboard section within ProfileView that displays the following stat cards for the authenticated user: (1) Tasks Completed — total number of tasks the user has completed as a performer, (2) User Rating — the user's average star rating received from task creators, (3) Total Ratings — the total number of rating reviews the user has received, and (4) Tasks Posted — total number of tasks the user has created. Fetch this data from the user's backend Profile record.

new_feature_requests.summary: Profile icon click triggers account creation flow before showing user dashboard
User dashboard showing tasks completed, user ratings, total ratings, and related stats

Ensure the backend Profile type and related query endpoints expose all necessary fields for the dashboard stats: tasksCompleted count, averageRating, totalRatingsCount, and tasksPosted count. Add or update these fields in the Motoko actor if they are not already present or not returned by the existing getProfile/getCallerProfile endpoints.
